message:
Add resize coalescing and queue stats to remote terminal WebSocket endpoint

- Replace scalar queue_depth with structured queue_stats including
  depth, dropped_oldest_total, and resize_coalesced_total counters
- Expose coalescing and drop metrics in POST /mail/ws-input response
  for operational visibility into terminal event queue health
- Add mail_ws_input_coalesces_resize_bursts test verifying that
  3 consecutive Resize events are coalesced into 1 queued event
  with correct coalesced_total counter

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
